meaning: 山东(位于中国东部沿海、黄河下游)
examples: He has a slight Shandong accent.
Mo was born into a farming family in a village in Shandong Province.
Mo Yan was born into a family in Shandong in 1955.
Haier is a Chinese multinational consumer electronics and home appliances company headquartered in Qingdao, Shandong, China.
Other early transfers of important Japanese technology included two petrochemical complexes in Heilongjiang and Shandong provinces.
